subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Thy letter hath come and attained the presence of the Wronged One. Today all are beheld upon a single plane [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی نامه ات حاضر و باصغاء مظلوم فائز امروز کل در صقع واحد مشاهده میشوند هر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement
